evidence: OSS API healthy on host port 3099 (container PORT=5171). Registered tenant via POST /v1/auth/register, created incident via POST /v1/admin/incidents, proposed remediation via POST /api/v1/remediation with ecs.updateService + ecs.forceNewDeployment actions.
GET /api/v1/remediation/:id/proposal → HTTP 200 with steps[] listing AWS actions (action, label, description, riskLevel, params).

POST /api/v1/remediation/:id/approve with admin JWT → HTTP 200, status=approved, approvedBy populated from JWT email. ApproveRemediationUseCase calls approvalRepo.create() (ApprovalEntity in PgApprovalRepository in-memory store).
Second POST /api/v1/remediation/:id/approve → HTTP 409 CONFLICT (remediation no longer in proposed state).
